tasks.subject: Task 1: Image-side ABCs + PipelineState + Stage Protocol + registry helpers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add ImageProfile, ImageJob, ImageBackend, ImageEngine, PipelineState, required_image_roles; update Stage Protocol to run(state)->state; add register_image_engine/get_image_engine.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py
- Modify: src/kinoforge/core/registry.py
- Create: tests/core/test_image_interfaces.py
- Create: tests/pipeline/test_pipeline_state.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ImageProfile/ImageJob/ImageBackend(ABC)/ImageEngine(ABC) defined per spec §3
- PipelineState(frozen) with request + artifacts dict default empty
- Stage Protocol run(self, state)->PipelineState
- required_image_roles helper handles both pre/post-T2 schemas
- register/get_image_engine work with UnknownAdapter on miss
- 8 tests pass; mypy/ruff/pre-commit clean

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/core/test_image_interfaces.py tests/pipeline/test_pipeline_state.py -v && pixi run pre-commit run --files <touched files>

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py", "src/kinoforge/core/registry.py", "tests/core/test_image_interfaces.py", "tests/pipeline/test_pipeline_state.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/core/test_image_interfaces.py tests/pipeline/test_pipeline_state.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ABCs defined", "PipelineState frozen", "Stage Protocol updated", "required_image_roles works", "registry helpers work", "8 tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: MODE_ROLE_REQUIREMENTS schema migration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Migrate MODE_ROLE_REQUIREMENTS from dict[str, set[str]] to dict[str, dict[str, str]]. Update 3 prod touch sites + 1 test literal. Add VALID_KINDS drift-guard.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py:237
- Modify: src/kinoforge/pipeline/generate_clip.py:166
- Modify: src/kinoforge/core/validation.py:62
- Modify: tests/core/test_interfaces.py:69
- Modify: PROGRESS.md:72

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Schema migrated to new shape; key-membership preserved
- New VALID_KINDS lockdown test passes
- Existing tests (continuity dispatch, validation role contract) still pass
- required_image_roles returns same lists pre/post

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/core/test_interfaces.py tests/core/test_validation.py tests/pipeline/test_generate_clip.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py", "src/kinoforge/pipeline/generate_clip.py", "src/kinoforge/core/validation.py", "tests/core/test_interfaces.py", "PROGRESS.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/core/test_interfaces.py tests/core/test_validation.py tests/pipeline/test_generate_clip.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["schema migrated", "3 prod sites updated", "VALID_KINDS lockdown passes", "existing tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Extract artifact_bytes helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Move GenerateClipStage._artifact_bytes into src/kinoforge/pipeline/artifact_bytes.py so KeyframeStage reuses it.

**Files:**
- Create: src/kinoforge/pipeline/artifact_bytes.py
- Modify: src/kinoforge/pipeline/generate_clip.py (delete _artifact_bytes; import + delegate)
- Create: tests/pipeline/test_artifact_bytes.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- artifact_bytes(artifact, http_get_bytes=None)->bytes resolves uri→file → url→http → synthetic fallback
- GenerateClipStage delegates via the helper
- Existing generate_clip tests still pass
- 8 new tests pass

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/pipeline/test_artifact_bytes.py tests/pipeline/test_generate_clip.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/pipeline/artifact_bytes.py", "src/kinoforge/pipeline/generate_clip.py", "tests/pipeline/test_artifact_bytes.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/pipeline/test_artifact_bytes.py tests/pipeline/test_generate_clip.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["helper resolves all 3 paths", "GenerateClipStage delegates", "8 new tests pass", "existing tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: GenerateClipStage signature migration — segments=constructor, run(state)->state
tasks.description:
**Goal:** GenerateClipStage.run(state)->PipelineState. Drop segments_override kwarg, promote to segments constructor field. ~30 test sites migrated via _make_stage/_run helpers.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/kinoforge/pipeline/generate_clip.py
- Modify: src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py (callsite)
- Modify: src/kinoforge/core/batch.py (callsite)
- Modify: tests/pipeline/test_generate_clip.py (~30 sites + helper)
- Modify: tests/core/test_pool.py (stage_kwargs)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- segments is non-default dataclass field
- run(state)->PipelineState; state.artifacts['clip'] populated
- Orchestrator + batch call stage.run(state) (no override kwarg)
- All pre-existing tests pass via _make_stage + _run helpers

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/pipeline/ tests/core/test_pool.py tests/core/test_orchestrator.py tests/core/test_batch.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/pipeline/generate_clip.py", "src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py", "src/kinoforge/core/batch.py", "tests/pipeline/test_generate_clip.py", "tests/core/test_pool.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/pipeline/ tests/core/test_pool.py tests/core/test_orchestrator.py tests/core/test_batch.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["segments constructor field", "run(state)->state", "callsites updated", "existing tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: JsonImageProfileCache namespace split
tasks.description:
**Goal:** JsonImageProfileCache stores ImageProfile under <hex>.image.json (separate from <hex>.json video namespace). Thin subclass of JsonProfileCache via factored extension seams.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/kinoforge/core/profiles.py (factor seams + append subclass)
- Create: tests/core/test_image_profile_cache.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- resolve miss → ProfileNotCached; discover writes .image.json; resolve hit reads it
- Image and video caches for same CapabilityKey don't collide
- verify match/mismatch semantics correct
- supported_modes set round-trips; max_resolution tuple round-trips
- 10 tests pass; existing video-cache tests still pass

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/core/test_image_profile_cache.py tests/core/test_profiles.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/profiles.py", "tests/core/test_image_profile_cache.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/core/test_image_profile_cache.py tests/core/test_profiles.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["namespace split works", "no cross-cache collision", "verify semantics", "round-trips", "10 new + existing tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: FakeImageEngine + FakeImageBackend + self-registration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Deterministic GPU-free image engine for offline tests.

**Files:**
- Create: src/kinoforge/image_engines/__init__.py
- Create: src/kinoforge/image_engines/fake/__init__.py
- Create: tests/image_engines/__init__.py
- Create: tests/image_engines/test_fake.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- name='fake', requires_compute=False, requires_local_weights=False
- submit deterministic 16-hex ID from sha256(prompt+spec)
- result returns Artifact(filename=f'fake-image-{id}.png', meta=...)
- validate_spec raises on missing 'model'
- Self-registers under 'fake'
- 7 tests pass

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/image_engines/test_fake.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/image_engines/__init__.py", "src/kinoforge/image_engines/fake/__init__.py", "tests/image_engines/__init__.py", "tests/image_engines/test_fake.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/image_engines/test_fake.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["engine flags correct", "deterministic submit IDs", "validate_spec gates work", "self-registers", "7 tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: FalImageEngine + FalImageBackend + self-registration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Live-fire image engine wrapping fal.ai queue API. Reuses engines/fal/wire.py helpers. HTTP via injected seams; offline tests use fakes.

**Files:**
- Create: src/kinoforge/image_engines/fal/__init__.py
- Create: tests/image_engines/test_fal.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- provision raises AuthError when FAL_KEY unset; passes when set
- submit POSTs to https://queue.fal.run/<endpoint> with Auth header + spec.input + params merge
- result polls status_url then fetches response_url; ERROR raises; empty images raises
- profile_for returns static ImageProfile((1024,1024), {'t2i'})
- validate_spec gates prompt + spec.model
- Self-registers under 'fal'
- 13 offline tests pass with injected seams

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/image_engines/test_fal.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/image_engines/fal/__init__.py", "tests/image_engines/test_fal.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/image_engines/test_fal.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["auth gate works", "submit POST shape", "result poll-then-fetch", "error paths", "self-registers", "13 tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: KeyframeConfig pydantic + Config.keyframe field
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add KeyframeRoleOverride + KeyframeConfig + Config.keyframe field with prompt-required + role-names-known validators.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/kinoforge/core/config.py
- Create: tests/core/test_keyframe_config.py
- Modify: tests/core/test_config.py (1 extra test)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Config without keyframe loads; cfg.keyframe is None
- Missing both top-level + role prompts raises ValueError
- Unknown role name raises ValueError
- extra='forbid' enforced
- capability_key deterministic on spec dict-key order
- 8 new + 1 config test pass

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/core/test_keyframe_config.py tests/core/test_config.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/config.py", "tests/core/test_keyframe_config.py", "tests/core/test_config.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/core/test_keyframe_config.py tests/core/test_config.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["validators work", "extra=forbid", "capability_key deterministic", "9 tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: KeyframeStage implementation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement KeyframeStage.run per spec §5. Per-role gap fill; persistence via ArtifactStore; prompt/spec/params resolution helpers.

**Files:**
- Create: src/kinoforge/pipeline/keyframe.py
- Create: tests/pipeline/test_keyframe_stage.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- i2v empty assets → fills init_image
- flf2v empty assets → fills both bookends with per-role prompts
- Partial fill: user-supplied first_frame preserved bit-identical; only last_frame generated
- Per-role prompt > top-level; missing both raises ValidationError
- Per-role spec/params shallow-merge
- Non-image-kind roles skipped (forward-compat)
- Filename keyframe-<role>.png; state.artifacts[f'keyframe-{role}'] populated
- Original state not mutated
- 12 tests pass

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/pipeline/test_keyframe_stage.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/pipeline/keyframe.py", "tests/pipeline/test_keyframe_stage.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/pipeline/test_keyframe_stage.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["i2v fill", "flf2v fill", "partial fill preserves user", "prompt resolution", "spec merge", "kind filter", "no mutation", "12 tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Orchestrator pipeline list-walker + image engine pre-resolution
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Refactor generate() to pre-resolve image engine + backend + profile when cfg.keyframe set; build stages list; walk via shared PipelineState; extract state.artifacts['clip']. Add image_engine + image_profile_provider test seams.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py (generate body)
- Modify: src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py (add ImageProfileProvider ABC)
- Modify: tests/core/test_orchestrator.py (6 new tests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- cfg.keyframe is None → 1-stage pipeline
- cfg.keyframe set → KeyframeStage first, GenerateClipStage second
- Image engine resolved BEFORE deploy_session (unknown name fails fast)
- ImageProfileProvider seam: cache miss → discover; hit → resolve
- ValidationError triggers existing teardown
- Returns tuple[Artifact, Instance|None]; Artifact is state.artifacts['clip']
- 6 new tests pass

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/core/test_orchestrator.py tests/pipeline/ tests/core/test_pool.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py", "src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py", "tests/core/test_orchestrator.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/core/test_orchestrator.py tests/pipeline/ tests/core/test_pool.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["1-stage default", "2-stage when keyframe", "image engine pre-resolved", "cache miss→discover", "teardown on ValidationError", "6 new tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 15: RED scaffold for live smoke (commit before any spend)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Per CLAUDE.md durability rule — commit failing live-smoke scaffold BEFORE invoking paid fal API. Default-skip pattern.

**Files:**
- Create: tests/live/test_keyframe_fal_live.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Test file with 2 tests; both pytest.skip when KINOFORGE_LIVE_TESTS unset
- pytest.fail (not skip) when env set but FAL_KEY missing
- Default pixi run test gains +2 skips (6→8)
- Committed BEFORE T16 invocation

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/live/test_keyframe_fal_live.py -v (expect 2 skipped)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/live/test_keyframe_fal_live.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/live/test_keyframe_fal_live.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["2 tests defined", "default skip", "fail-loud on env+no-creds", "committed pre-spend"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 16: Live smoke run + iterate on real-cloud bugs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Invoke KINOFORGE_LIVE_TESTS=1 pixi run test tests/live/test_keyframe_fal_live.py -v against real fal-ai/flux-schnell + wan endpoints autonomously. Iterate on any real-cloud bugs surfaced.

**Files:**
- Modify (if bugs surface): src/kinoforge/image_engines/fal/__init__.py + related

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- pixi run preflight exits 0 before invocation
- 2 passed under KINOFORGE_LIVE_TESTS=1 + FAL_KEY
- keyframe-init_image.png PNG magic (i2v)
- keyframe-first_frame != keyframe-last_frame bytes (flf2v)
- clip MP4 ftyp box in first 32 bytes
- Total spend ≤ $0.20
- Each real-cloud bug gets own fix commit + regression test

**Verify:** KINOFORGE_LIVE_TESTS=1 pixi run test tests/live/test_keyframe_fal_live.py -v 2>&1 | tee /tmp/layer-r-live.log

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/image_engines/fal/__init__.py", "tests/live/test_keyframe_fal_live.py"], "verifyCommand": "KINOFORGE_LIVE_TESTS=1 pixi run test tests/live/test_keyframe_fal_live.py -v 2>&1 | tee /tmp/layer-r-live.log", "acceptanceCriteria": ["preflight exits 0", "2 passed", "PNG magic on keyframes", "flf2v bookends differ", "MP4 ftyp", "spend <= $0.20", "each bug fix atomic"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 17: README + PROGRESS.md Phase 32 entry + final-gate full suite
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add README 'Keyframe stage' section; append Phase 32 entry to PROGRESS.md; run full suite + invariants; commit close-out.

**Files:**
- Modify: README.md
- Modify: PROGRESS.md

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- README has 'Keyframe stage' subsection with i2v + flf2v examples
- PROGRESS Phase 32 entry follows existing format (per-task SHAs, decisions, live confirmation, carry-forwards)
- GH-issue table row #4 flips to CLOSED (Layer R)
- Single-next-action updated
- pixi run test passes full suite (~1186 + 8 skipped)
- pixi run pre-commit run --all-files clean
- Final commit references Phase 32 + closes #4

**Verify:** pixi run test -q && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files

